commit.message:
fix: add reflection to QM metadata extraction dependencies

The qm-metadata-* targets set QORE_MODULE_DIR to include the reflection
build directory but did not declare a build dependency on the reflection
target. With parallel make, metadata extraction could race with reflection
linking, reading a partially-written .qmod file and failing with
"Exec format error".

commit.message:
Phase 2 fix: merge left+right hands before tokenization

REMI is a single-track format. Previously, split_files_for_training
processed each MIDI track independently, producing separate right-hand
and left-hand chunks. The model fine-tuned on those learned single-hand
patterns and generated single-hand output.

Fix: merge all tracks into one before chunking and seeding.
- Added merge_tracks() utility in setup cell
- All 19 corpus MIDIs now produce two-hand chunks (58 train, 5 valid)
- Lost waltz seed is now 1 merged sequence (1148 tokens, was 2x separate)
- Reduced pitch augmentation from ±12 to ±3/±5 semitones
- Added data/chunked/ and data/merged/ to .gitignore (regenerable)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(figma-console-mastery): v1.3.0 — external library import workflows

Add empirically-verified workflows for importing components from external
libraries via the Plugin API, with distinct paths for Team Libraries
(importComponentByKeyAsync) and UI Kits (Clone Pattern).

Key findings from production testing:
- Team Libraries: full import/set/style API works when library is published + enabled
- UI Kits (M3, iOS, Apple): invisible to both Plugin API and REST API; Clone Pattern only
- figma_search_components searches local file only, not external libraries
- teamLibrary API in Desktop Bridge exposes only 2 methods (variable collections)

commit.message:
fix: run shell context menu on STA thread to load all extension handlers

Shell extension handlers (7-Zip, Notepad++, etc.) are in-process STA
COM servers. When IContextMenu is created from an MTA thread (the .NET
console app default), COM marshals calls across apartments and the
handlers silently refuse to load, producing only the generic built-in
menu. Fix: dispatch ShowCore() onto a dedicated STA thread via
Thread.SetApartmentState(STA) so all registered handlers load and
appear correctly.

commit.message:
fix: entrypoint hangs on docker stop — rewrite shutdown logic (#282)

`docker compose stop` hangs indefinitely because `wait` on the PM2
child PID doesn't get interrupted by SIGTERM reliably (PM2 catches
the signal itself).

Fix:
- Replace `wait` with a sleep loop that bash can interrupt on signals
- Add direct `kill` of PM2 PID as fallback after `pm2 kill`
- Add explicit `exit 0` in cleanup handler
- Guard against double cleanup with SHUTTING_DOWN flag

Co-authored-by: zylos-01 <zylos-01@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: 번역 엔진 Gemini → DeepL 전환 — 응답 0.3-1초로 초저지연 달성

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: fix SVG rasterisation scale — rasterise at ¼ size then upscale bitmap

Previous attempt used .resize(w, h) on SVG input which passes the target
dimensions directly to librsvg, so it still rendered feMorphology at full
25MP. Fix: call .toBuffer() first to rasterise at the SVG's declared ¼
size (~1.6MP), then resize the resulting PNG bitmap with Lanczos.

feMorphology at ¼ scale (~1.6MP) should take ~3s vs ~55s at full size.

Implement new login flow: Name → PIN → Zone → Role → Dashboard

Phase 1 - Database migrations applied:
- role_sop_assignments table (SOP-to-role assignments)
- login_sessions table (audit trail)
- role_id on task_templates (role-based task targeting)
- is_adhoc + adhoc_name on task_completions (one-off tasks)
- staff.zone_id and staff.role_id now nullable (self-select daily)

Phase 2 - New login flow:
- /login - Select name from all active staff (button grid)
- /login/pin - Enter PIN verified against selected person
- /login/zone - Select zone for the day (everyone picks)
- /login/role - Select daily role in that zone (Cashier 1, etc.)
- /api/start-shift - Consolidated shift + task creation endpoint
  Creates shift, role-based task completions, and audit log entry
- /api/pin-verify simplified to staff_id + pin only
- Auth store restructured: selectedStaff pre-auth, login on completion
- All redirects updated: /role and /zone → /login

Replace "kansalainen" with "kuntalainen" (4 labels) and align other
labels with evaka's actual i18n translations: use "varhaiskasvatusaika",
"varhaiskasvatuksen", "varhaiskasvatuspaikkatakuu", and "asiakirjapohjien".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Enable sniper as primary signal model, remove fake shadow tracks

Sniper now runs directly in Step 5 with sniper_enabled=True (was False,
requiring shadow track override that never actually worked). Removed
sniper_v1_max3/max2 shadow tracks — the engine-shadow system only re-runs
Steps 12-13 synthesis, not Step 5 signal generation, so the sniper config
overrides were no-ops.

Architecture pivot: MR + Sniper are the primary trading signals (Steps 5-9).
Engines (Steps 10-13) continue as observer/telemetry. Sniper performance
tracked via DB outcomes (signal_model='sniper'). Max3 vs Max2 sizing
evaluated offline via sleeve simulator once live trades accumulate.

commit.message:
Add Trusted by Physicians Nationwide testimonials section

4 physician testimonials from MacRae, Sauer, Goldberg, Mandelker placed
after Shawn's bio card — credentials followed immediately by social proof.
Plain section style (no GradientCard) with 2-col grid, italic quote blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix natural-mode crop to output at native bounding-box dimensions

Previously, natural mode scaled the cropped region back up to 1024px wide,
making the output the same size as the source — no visible crop. Now the
output canvas is exactly srcW × srcH (the tight bounding box of non-transparent
pixels), producing a genuinely smaller image when the object doesn't fill the
full source canvas.

Square mode is unchanged: content is letterboxed inside canvasWidth × canvasWidth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Show collection info in dataset dialogs (#1074)

* Show collection info in dataset dialogs and fix empty label

Remove :more-chips="false" from AddDatasetToProjectDialog and
AddDatasetToCollection so collection chips load via batch resolve.
Update FileItemRow to show "Not in a collection" when no collection
chips exist, and hide "Datasets in collection:" label when empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix dialog width: override Vuetify 3 default 50% constraint

Vuetify 3 sets width: 50% on the outer .v-dialog element, so
width="90%" only applied to the inner content (= 45% of viewport).
Add .wide-dialog class with width: auto override, and set dialogs
to 70% width for a balanced layout.

commit.message:
fix: install.sh — nightly toolchain, bpf-linker, WSL systemd detection

Bugs fixed:
- Remove invalid 'rustup target add bpfel-unknown-none' (no prebuilt std,
  silently failed and misled the user)
- Add nightly toolchain install with rust-src (was missing entirely)
- Add bpf-linker install step (was missing entirely)
- Fix eBPF build command: 'cargo +nightly' instead of plain 'cargo'
  (-Z build-std=core is nightly-only; plain cargo used stable and failed)
- Export PATH immediately after rustup install so subsequent commands work
  in the same shell process without needing to restart
- Detect systemd via pid-1 check rather than just 'command -v systemctl'
  (WSL has systemctl binary but may not run systemd as init)
- Show manual run instructions + WSL systemd enable steps when no systemd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Epic/ivy studio (#2123)

* feat(devtools): add widget inspector and change request UI

Introduces DevTools with widget inspection, speech-to-text change requests,
and visual markers for proposed UI changes. Adds CSS and typings for ivy-widget.

* feat(devtools): add widget callsite info for debugging

Capture and expose widget callsite metadata in DEBUG builds.
Callsite info is included in serialization and surfaced in the
frontend DevTools overlay for easier debugging and mapping
widget instances to their source code locations.

* feat(server): add flag to enable DevTools via meta tag

Introduce EnableDevTools server argument and meta tag to control
DevTools visibility in the frontend. Adds detection logic in frontend.

* chore(tmp): remove temporary cwd files from repo

Deleted tmpclaude-136e-cwd and tmpclaude-94b0-cwd used for local development.

* feat(hooks): support async IAsyncDisposable effects

Add UseEffect overloads for async IAsyncDisposable cleanup.
Introduce AsyncDisposableAdapter to bridge async disposal with IDisposable.
Improve IsPortInUse to check both IPv4 and IPv6.

* refactor(dispose): migrate to IAsyncDisposable throughout

Switch all core disposables from IDisposable to IAsyncDisposable,
introducing async disposal patterns for contexts, widget trees,
effects, and sessions. Adds adapters for sync/async interop.
Removes blocking dispose adapters and updates usages to await
async disposal where appropriate.

* feat(devtools,xterm): add DevTools text editing & Xterm widget

- Add DevTools "Text Edit" mode with live content overrides for TextBlock and Markdown widgets
- Improve DevTools toolbar, styling, and widget overlay UX
- Support inline editing and change request tracking for text content
- Add Ivy.Widgets.Xterm package: terminal emulator widget using xterm.js
- Document Xterm widget props, events, and usage
- Update widget infrastructure for content override subscriptions

Includes frontend, backend, and documentation for new DevTools and Xterm features.

* refactor(signal): unify sender/receiver as ISignal and UseSignal

Consolidate ISignalSender and ISignalReceiver into a single ISignal interface.
Replace CreateSignal/UseSignal with only UseSignal for both sending and receiving.
Update docs, samples, and usages to reflect API simplification.

* refactor(devtools): move DevTools CSS to separate file

Extract DevTools-related styles from index.css into devtools.css.
Update imports and classNames accordingly for better modularity
and maintainability. No visual changes introduced.

* Enhance widget callsite tracking and improve context for change requests

* feat(xterm,core,frontend): add backend-to-frontend stream support

Introduce the UseStream hook and IWriteStream<T> for server-to-client streaming.
Refactor Terminal widget to use streaming for output.
Implement frontend stream subscription and context.
Standardize external widget event handler prop to `eventHandler`.
Add sample interactive console app for xterm widget.

* feat(xterm): add PTY process support and clipboard features

Introduce Ivy.Pty hook for PTY-backed terminals and enhance the
xterm widget with clipboard, Unicode, and web link support.
Refactor demo to use PTY integration and Spectre.Console.

* feat(stream): buffer and flush stream data on subscribe

Add buffering to WriteStream so data is sent only after client subscribes.
Buffered data is flushed upon subscription notification from frontend.

* Add buffer option to WriteStream and update UseStream extension

* feat(pty): switch stream to byte[] and base64 encode output

Change PTY streams to use byte[] for raw output, base64-encode for transport, and decode in frontend to preserve control characters. Adds OnOutput callback and updates terminal widget integration.

* refactor(pty): replace Quick.PtyNet with Porta.Pty package

Switches dependency to Porta.Pty and updates related code.
Removes ForceWinPty option no longer required by new package.
Also updates terminal font family default in frontend.

* refactor(pty): rename Ivy.Pty to Ivy.Hooks.Pty

Renamed project, namespaces, and references from Ivy.Pty to Ivy.Hooks.Pty for consistency.

* fix(Terminal): ensure terminal readiness before resizing

* feat: add incremental frontend builds and fix signal docs

- Add incremental build support for Leaflet and Tiptap widgets
  (skips npm install/build when source files unchanged)
- Fix UseSignal docs: replace CreateSignal with UseSignal

* feat: add internal ChatBox.cs (#2122)

* feat: add SingleAnswerQuestion widget and Box BorderColor support

- Add SingleAnswerQuestion internal view component for yes/no prompts
- Add BorderColor property to Box widget (supports hex colors and Colors enum)
- Update BoxWidget frontend to handle separate borderColor prop
- Adjust small button height to h-6 and remove background from outline variant
- Add sample app for testing SingleAnswerQuestion

* feat: simplify, add more examples

* revert gitignore

* format

* simplify again

* adding border opacity

* (ivy-studio): Editor Header Widget (#2132)

* UsePty: exclude app from CommandLine (#2139)

* Clean up whitespace in IWidget.cs and Server.cs

* chore: formatting

* feat: fix build errors

* feat: handle input redirection when there is no console

* feat: Initialize global styles, theme variables, and animations using Tailwind CSS and Ivy Design System.

* Minor cleanup in IConnection interface

* refactor: change IConnection.RegisterServices to accept Server instead of IServiceCollection

This enables auth connections to call server.UseAuth<T>() directly,
allowing auth to be configured via generated connection files instead
of modifying Program.cs.

BREAKING CHANGE: IConnection.RegisterServices signature changed from
IServiceCollection to Server. Use server.Services for service registration.

* fix: prevent crashes during init

* fix: skip scanning assemblies that don't reference Ivy

Add ReferencesIvy check for already-loaded assemblies to prevent
errors when scanning user project assemblies with incompatible dependencies.

* Add best practises documentation for UseQuery, layout, and ToTable

* feat: add support for console streaming

* fix: remove empty keys from the env dict

* docs(agents): add Application Structure and Connections sections to AGENTS.md

Expand AGENTS.md with project structure guidance (folder layout, Program.cs
patterns, URL routing, DI), database connection workflow (ivy db add, generated
files, EF Core usage in views), and custom IConnection examples. Also improves
[App] attribute docs with named parameter syntax and Lucide icon notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: inject IConfiguration into TestConnection and auth provider constructors

Replace internal ConfigurationBuilder usage with injected IConfiguration parameter
in IConnection.TestConnection() and auth provider constructors (Basic, Auth0, Authelia,
Clerk, MicrosoftEntra, Supabase) to standardize config injection and improve testability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add DescribeConnection and TestConnection functionality to Server

* Remove Connections section from AGENTS.md

Connections documentation moved to Developer persona prompt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve AGENTS.md with doc links for hooks and inputs

Replace placeholder hook and input lists with actual documentation
links. Fix DropDownMenu missing .md extension. Reorganize reference
sections to reduce duplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: only enable dev tools via browser messaging events

* fix: pass forward prop in payload

* Remove GlobalUsings.cs from Samples and add per-file usings

Delete GlobalUsings.cs and add explicit using directives to each
sample app file. Update docs to remove GlobalUsings.cs references
from project structure descriptions.

* style: remove BOM from using directives across sample applications.

* Refactor Card properties and update app workflow logic; add FolderHelper utility

* style: remove extraneous blank lines

* refactor: flatten Ivy namespaces and separate public API from internal implementation

Collapse ~20 sub-namespaces (Ivy.Apps, Ivy.Auth, Ivy.Views.*, Ivy.Widgets.Inputs,
Ivy.Shared, Ivy.Services, Ivy.Hooks, Ivy.Helpers, Ivy.Chrome, Ivy.Client, Ivy.Charts)
into a single `namespace Ivy;` for the public API surface.

Move internal implementation types to Ivy.Core.* sub-namespaces:
- Ivy.Core.Apps (AppSession, AppRepository, AppRouter, etc.)
- Ivy.Core.Auth (AuthController, AuthHelper, CookieJar, etc.)
- Ivy.Core.Chrome (ChromeUtils)
- Ivy.Core.Server (AppHub, AppSessionStore, HotReloadService, etc.)
- Ivy.Core.Server.Middleware (PathToAppIdMiddleware)

Move abstractions (IView, IState, IMemoized, Event, etc.) to Ivy/Abstractions/.
Move ViewExtensions.Key() to namespace Ivy for consumer accessibility.
Add ReSharper CheckNamespace annotations for files in subfolders.
Remove redundant using statements from consumer projects.

* Refactor namespace structure and update documentation for Ivy

* Refactor namespace structure by moving internal types to Ivy.Core sub-namespaces

* Add namespace information for Ivy in AGENTS.md

* Add Test.Muted styling modifier and update Ivy.Colors documentation

* refactor: Remove GlobalUsings files and redundant using directives from authentication examples.

* feat: make terminal theme aware

* auth examples: put registration code in connection class

* style: adjust whitespace in MemoizationApp and ClientExtensions.

* [docs]: remove references to flattened Ivy.Services namespace (#2308)

* [docs]: remove references to flattened Ivy.Services namespace

* [docs]: remove redundant using directive from Volume example

* chore: fix format

* [docs]: remove references to flattened namespaces

* [docs]: address review feedback, rename IvyShared to Ivy

* [docs]: update remaining flattened namespace references

* chore: fix format

* docs: Update API reference links from IvyShared to Ivy in documentation files.

* feat: enhance migration handling with connection string support

* Fix more uses of flattened namespaces

* feat: fix

* chore: fix build errors

* fix: handle iframe events better

* feat: make devtools theme aware

* docs: strengthen Gap/Padding defaults guidance and remove unused import

Explicitly state Gap(4) is the default and should not be added. Remove
redundant .Gap(4) and .Padding(8) from Grid example. Add note that
.Padding() is rarely needed. Also remove unused Ivy.Core import in
Loading.cs.

* feat: fail server startup on missing IHaveSecrets secrets

Validate all declared secrets at startup before starting the server.
Previously missing secrets were only checked via --test-connection,
leading to silent runtime failures during normal operation.

* Add FAQ section and update documentation process for agent questions

* Refactor documentation for clarity and cleanup instructions

* refactor: remove redundant using directives from Sliplane example files.

* I don't know what is this commit

* docs: add space-between layout FAQ entry

Prevents agent hallucination of non-existent LayoutView.SpaceBetween()
by documenting the Spacer + Size.Grow() pattern for spacing items apart.

* docs: add UseMutation FAQ entry

* docs: add local source configuration FAQ entry

* feat: add Preset support to Secret record for optional prefilled secrets

Secrets with a Preset value are no longer flagged as missing, enabling
connections to declare optional configuration (e.g. a default endpoint)
that users can override via the secrets system.

* docs: add streaming API responses FAQ entry

* docs: add Ivy namespaces FAQ entry

Agents were hallucinating sub-namespaces like Ivy.Views.Dashboards,
causing build errors. This FAQ clarifies that all Ivy types live in
the root `Ivy` namespace with no sub-namespaces.

* docs: add DataTable row actions FAQ entry

* docs: add ButtonVariant FAQ entry

* feat: make QueryResult<T> implement IEffectTriggerConvertible

QueryResult<T> can now be passed directly to UseEffect as a trigger,
enabling reactive patterns like `UseEffect(() => { ... }, query)`.

* docs: add UseQuery inline reference to AGENTS.md

* feat: add TypeDescriber utility for compact EF model summaries

* Update documentation to replace 'dotnet watch' with 'ivy run' for project execution

* feat: add theme hot reload support via SignalR

Store a theme factory in ThemeService so themes can be re-created when
.NET hot reload fires. Both UseTheme overloads (Action<Theme> callback
and derived Theme class) store appropriate factories. On hot reload,
the theme is regenerated and broadcast to connected browsers via the
existing ApplyTheme SignalR message.

* feat: add UseTheme(Func<Theme>) overload for factory method hot reload

Themes created via static factory methods (e.g. NeoPunkTheme.Create)
return plain Theme instances, so the existing UseTheme(Theme) overload
skips setting a ThemeFactory and hot reload silently does nothing.
The new Func<Theme> overload always sets the factory, enabling hot reload.

* feat: refresh sidebar menu items on app hot-reload

Add IObservable<Unit> Reloaded to AppRepository that fires after each
Reload(). DefaultSidebarChrome subscribes via UseEffect trigger so the
sidebar menu updates when apps are added, removed, or modified.

* feat: add Ivy.XamlBuilder for declarative XAML-to-widget-tree building

Introduces XamlBuilder class that parses XAML-style XML and produces
Ivy widget trees via reflection. Supports attribute props, property
element syntax for complex/nested types and arrays, Size/Thickness
parsing, and nested enum resolution.

* fix: guard license public key meta tag fallback to DEV-only

Wrap the meta tag fallback in an import.meta.env.DEV check so Vite
tree-shakes getIvyLicensePublicKey and the DOM query from production
builds. Also adds a !_publicKeyPem guard for robustness.

* chore: remove unused Ivy.Core import from AreaChart

* docs: add centered max-width layout tip to AGENTS.md

* Add AppBase and State<T> hallucination warnings to AGENTS.md

Agents commonly hallucinate AppBase (instead of ViewBase) and State<T>
(instead of IState<T>), wasting build cycles on self-correction. Add
inline warnings at the relevant documentation sections to prevent this.

* feat: add SidebarOpen setting to control initial sidebar state

Adds a `SidebarOpen` property to `ChromeSettings` (default: true) that
flows through `SidebarLayout.Open` to the frontend widget, allowing the
sidebar to start closed via `ChromeSettings.Default().SidebarOpen(false)`.

* fix: use atomic AddOrUpdate for signal subscriber registration

Replace non-atomic TryRemove/TryAdd pair with a single AddOrUpdate
call to eliminate race condition where a subscriber could be missed.

* fix: use ConcurrentDictionary for AbstractWidget attached props thread safety

* refactor: add Server.UseCulture() to replace manual CultureInfo setup

Introduces a fluent UseCulture method on Server and migrates
DocsServer, SamplesServer, and all documentation examples from
the verbose CultureInfo.DefaultThreadCurrentCulture pattern.

* Add quick reference section to AGENTS.md for commonly hallucinated facts

* feat: auto-default single app and close sidebar when only one app exists

* feat(Ivy): Add RichTextBlock widget with TextRun segments and streaming support

* feat(Ivy): add ShowCopyButton and Placeholder fluent extensions for ReadOnlyInput

* docs: add FAQ entry clarifying App attribute has no layout parameter

* fix: resolve CS8602 null reference warning in XamlBuilderTests

* fix: respect SidebarOpen=false by gating media query on openProp

The useEffect media query handler was overriding the initial closed state
on mount. Now handleMediaChange checks openProp so the sidebar stays
closed when the server sends open={false}.

* fix: show available connections when connection name not found

When --test-connection or --describe-connection receives a non-matching
name, the error now lists all available connection names to help the
user correct their input.

* docs: Add UseAlert FAQ entry for IvyQuestion discoverability

* docs: Add DataTable nested property FAQ and agent guidance

* docs: Add FAQ entries for Sheet, Dialog, Toast, Delete, ListItem, and UseQuery patterns

* refactor: Update C# usings and documentation paths for Ivy.Shared, and enhance frontend widget rendering with call site and content tracking.

* style: adjust whitespace in effect log message for readabilit

* feat: add Ivy.Desktop library for wrapping Ivy apps as native desktop applications

Provides a reusable Photino wrapper with DesktopWindow builder API, DPI detection,
and MSBuild targets for native library copying across platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update API patterns for v1.2.15-1.2.18 breaking changes

- TextInputs.Textarea -> TextInputVariants.Textarea, ToTextAreaInput -> ToTextareaInput
- Button icon constructor param removed, use fluent .Icon() method
- HandleRowAction -> OnRowAction, HandleClick -> OnClick, HandleSelect -> OnSelect
- OAuth callback URL /ivy/webhook -> /ivy/auth/callback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: use primary constructor and improve fluent API in DesktopWindow

Use primary constructor for Server dependency, add default parameter
values to fluent methods, and rename DpiScaling/DevToolsEnabled to
UseDpiScaling/UseDevTools for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: migrate TiptapInput events to EventHandler and fix HandleBlur calls

Replace Func<..., ValueTask> event properties with EventHandler<...>
wrapper type. Fix incorrect direct property calls (widget.OnBlur) to
use the correct fluent methods (widget.HandleBlur).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add error handling with Photino error dialog to DesktopWindow

Wrap Run() in try-catch and show errors via a Photino error dialog
instead of Console.WriteLine, which is invisible in WinExe apps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: load error dialog HTML from temp file instead of LoadRawString

LoadRawString resulted in a blank white window. Using a temp file with
Load(Uri) matches the approach used for the main window and renders
correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: ensure DesktopWindow.Run() executes on STA thread for WebView2

WebView2 on Windows requires STA threading for its COM message pump.
Without it, Photino windows open but render blank content. Run() now
checks the apartment state and re-dispatches to an STA thread if needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: propagate actual server startup exceptions in DesktopWindow

Check serverTask status during port polling so that if the server
faults during startup, the real exception is shown in the error
dialog instead of a generic "Unable to connect" message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: show window immediately with loading page and use Ivy brand colors

Window now appears instantly with a branded loading spinner that polls
the server via JS fetch. Once the server responds, it navigates to the
app URL. Removes blocking CheckIfPortIsListening in favor of client-side
polling. Extracts CreateWindow helper and updates error dialog to use
Ivy brand colors (#0a0a0a bg, #dd5860 error, #00cc92 primary).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: handle ReflectionTypeLoadException when scanning assemblies

Add Assembly.GetLoadableTypes() extension that gracefully handles
missing referenced assemblies, preventing crashes when optional
assemblies like Ivy.Filters are not deployed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-scaffold [AllowedValues] as SelectInput in forms

String and string[] properties with [AllowedValues] are now automatically
scaffolded as SelectInput (single or multi-select), removing the need for
manual .Builder() calls. Closes #1589

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add UseConfiguration(Action<IConfigurationBuilder>) overload for external config providers

Allow users to extend the default configuration pipeline with external
sources (e.g. Azure Key Vault, AWS Secrets Manager) without losing the
built-in defaults (env vars, appsettings.json, user secrets).

Closes #1108

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add HTML content pipeline with filter-based architecture and PWA manifest support

Replace ad-hoc string replacements in UseFrontend() with a modular HtmlPipeline
that processes HTML through composable IHtmlFilter instances. Extract existing
injection logic into LicenseFilter, DevToolsFilter, MetaDescriptionFilter,
TitleFilter, ThemeFilter, and add ManifestFilter for PWA support. Add UseManifest()
and UseHtmlFilter() APIs on Server for extensibility.

Closes #830

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: wait for server to be ready before loading desktop window

Read the port after RunAsync so the actual bound port is used, and poll
a health endpoint to ensure the server is accepting requests before the
WebView navigates to it. Detects early server faults and timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add XamlBuilder live preview sample app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: support anonymous DataPoint arrays in XamlBuilder for chart data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: migrate from .sln to .slnx format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename Ivy.Filters to Ivy.Agent.Filter

Rename project, namespace, PackageId, and all references for Ivy.Filters,
Ivy.Filters.Tests, and Ivy.Filters.Eval.Console to use the Ivy.Agent.Filter
naming convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: replace DataPoint XML syntax with JSON CDATA for chart data

Use inline JSON arrays via <Data><![CDATA[...]]></Data> instead of
<DataPoint> elements. JSON provides native type distinctions (strings,
numbers, booleans) eliminating ambiguity from auto-parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add chart JSON data presets to XamlBuilderApp

Add Line Chart, Bar Chart, Area Chart, and Pie Chart examples that
demonstrate the JSON CDATA data feature in XamlBuilder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Ivy.Agent.EfQuery for natural language EF Core queries

Implements a multi-step LLM agent pipeline that converts natural language
questions into SQL queries against EF Core databases and renders results
as Ivy XAML widgets. Pipeline: Plan -> SQL (with validation/execution) -> XAML.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove Ivy.Tests project

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add convenience run scripts for Ivy.Docs and Ivy.Samples

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: skip port binding for CLI-only commands (--describe, --describe-connection, --test-connection)

These commands need DI but never start the web host, so they now use
port 0 and skip port-in-use checks to avoid conflicts with a running instance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add DbContext factory guidance to AGENTS.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FAQ entry for UseQuery with EF Core pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add min/max as optional parameters to ToNumberInput

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update AGENTS.md to clarify common misconceptions

* Remove convenience run scripts (moved to personal Scripts folder)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: use light theme, Geist font, and delayed loading spinner in DesktopWindow

* feat: mark Ivy.Desktop as packable for NuGet publishing

* feat: add FormSubmitStrategy (OnSubmit, OnBlur, OnChange) for controlling when form state is committed

Adds a new FormSubmitStrategy enum that controls when form state is
committed back to the model, separate from FormValidationStrategy which
controls validation timing. OnBlur commits when fields lose focus,
OnChange commits on every value change, and both hide the submit button.

* fix: only show badge hover effect when OnClick is registered

* feat: add optional Assembly parameter to AddConnectionsFromAssembly

Matches the existing AddAppsFromAssembly signature, allowing callers
to specify which assembly to scan for IConnection types (useful when
the entry assembly differs from the one containing connections).

* docs: add BadgeVariant FAQ entry

Add FAQ entry documenting available BadgeVariant enum values
and usage patterns (constructor, fluent method, shortcut extensions).

* docs: add Table FAQ entry for headers and rows

* docs: replace App attribute FAQ entry with comprehensive usage guide

* feat: add vertical padding to ListItem for better content spacing

* feat: auto-open sidebar when last tab is closed in DefaultSidebarChrome

* feat: implement RichTextBlock frontend widget

Add RichTextBlockWidget.tsx with support for styled text runs (bold, italic,
strikethrough, color, highlight), links with configurable targets, streaming
via useStream hook, and OnLinkClick event handling. Register in widgetMap.

* feat: hide remaining visible test apps from app list

* feat: move AllowedValuesFormApp into FormApp as a tab

* Enhance DesktopPublisher to support local source projects and update scaffolding logic

* fix: move UseSignal/UseEffect outside conditional to preserve hook ordering

UseSignal and UseEffect were called conditionally inside an if block
for OnBlur/OnChange strategies, violating hook ordering rules. When the
strategy changed at runtime, hook indices shifted causing
InvalidOperationException. Hooks are now always called, with the
conditional logic moved inside the effect body.

Also refactored the test app into tabbed layout with isolated per-tab
components to properly test each strategy independently.

* Hide FormSubmitStrategyTestApp from the app list

* feat: add streaming demo to RichTextApp sample

Showcase UseStream<TextRun> with a fake LLM response that streams
words token-by-token via a button click.

* feat: enhance EfQuery with schema control, safety improvements, and failure reporting

- SchemaCollector: add DB dialect detection, enum value mappings, TPH inheritance
  support, owned entity properties, EfQueryIgnore/EfQueryDescription attributes,
  and schema caching
- SqlValidator: strip SQL comments before validation, add MERGE to blocked keywords
- SqlExecutor: use ReadUncommitted isolation, always rollback in finally block
- EfQueryAgent: add report_failure tool for graceful LLM failure, embed SQL rules
  in tool responses for better instruction adherence
- EfQueryResult: add optional FailureReason property
- Tests: add coverage for enums, attributes, caching, comment stripping

* fix: align RichTextBlockWidget stream prop with WriteStreamJsonConverter output

The serializer produces `{ id: "..." }` but the component expected a plain
string, causing stream subscriptions to fail.

* docs: add FAQ entry for creating circular shapes with Box and BorderRadius.Full

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add UseState immutable type guidance to prevent silent re-render failures

Mutating objects in-place and passing the same reference to .Set() won't
trigger a re-render. Added warnings to AGENTS.md and UseState docs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add FAQ entry for NumberFormatStyle currency/percent/decimal formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add decimal and double overloads for Size.Fraction to prevent common type mismatch errors

Also adds matching overloads for Size.FractionGap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: reorganize AGENTS.md by moving UseState guidance inline and removing redundant sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Default currency to USD when FormatStyle is set to Currency via extension method

Fixes runtime TypeError when chaining .FormatStyle(NumberFormatStyle.Currency)
after ToNumberInput(), where ScaffoldDefaults had already run without setting
the currency code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove decimal and double overloads for Size.Fraction and Size.FractionGap to fix CS0121 ambiguous call errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: remove unnecessary blank line in `SelectInput.cs`.

* docs: add FAQ entry for icon sizing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add FAQ entry for text sizing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Update StackLayout tests to use RowGap instead of Gap property.

* refactor: move Ivy Namespace Flattening release note from 1.2.15 to 1.2.18.

* chore: add notes about auth stuff

* refactor: Rename `CreateSignal` to `UseSignal` and unify `ISignalSender`/`ISignalReceiver` into a single `ISignal` interface.

* fix: pre-serialize stream data with WidgetSerializer options for correct casing

Stream data (e.g. TextRun objects in RichText) was passed as raw objects
through SignalR, bypassing the camelCase naming policy and enum converters
used by WidgetSerializer. Pre-serialize complex objects to JsonNode using
WidgetSerializer.SerializerOptions so the client receives consistent property
names and enum values.

* chore: minor edits

* chore: minor edit

* chore: minor edit

* docs: add breaking change documentation for FormSubmitStrategy in v1.2.18.

docs: improve decision map with 'when you decide' framing

Adopt ChatGPT's clearer framing: organize by *when* you make each decision
rather than *what* each system does. More intuitive for first-time readers.

- "At install time" / "Per task" / "As policy" / "Never changes"
- Japanese: "導入時に" / "依頼ごとに" / "運用ポリシーとして" / "絶対に崩さない"
